_vc143icx232.x86_64.msi - The RenderMan rendering toolkit.
string includes the common distribution, e.g. windows10, the v
c/icc
versions, and the microprocessor instruction set, e.g. i686. Putting them all together provides, for example, an Windows 11 package named
windows11
.msi
The following additional requirements must be met:
All: CPU capable of running the full AVX instruction set.
To install the software, simply double-click on the appropriate MSI file, and click through the various dialogues. The default values are appropriate in most cases.

During the installation process, you will first be given a chance to select a root directory. By default, this directory is C:\ProgramFiles\Pixar\  This will become the root directory for all of the software components listed above. The installer also generates a log file in the download directory with a name formatted as:
rmaninstaller.XXXX.txt  This file may be referenced later if there are installation issues.
We'll no go step by step through the process. First you must login with your forum account and provide the serial number for the license you have purchased.
Next you may see the following if you are installing on a floating license server for the
Next you will see a list of packages you wish to install.

The installer will try to find the appropriate plugins to install as well. However if it cannot find a Maya installation or determines you have already installed the latest version of the software, you will give you a warning that something strange is afoot.
Here you can now decide which software and packages you wish to install. For instance if you do not wish to install the Katana plugins, you can deselect those. If you
like to instal the license server for a floating license installation, you may select the "Show All" button and select the license server package as well.
talks in detail about the steps that must be taken on each platform once the installation finishes to ensure that the floating license server is functioning correctly.
screen should appear. At this point you can exit the installer.
When the installer is finished, the floating license service should have been STARTED.
Windows License Server
goes over all the details for configuring and starting the floating license services if it was not started.

Other types of files besides RenderMan, the License Server and the DCC plugins can be downloaded with the installer as well. These include the RenderMan Examples. These will be placed in the user who ran the RenderManInstaller Download directory.
